title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md has been significantly updated with engine layer, adapters, store, embed, sense, and memory formal sections. ONE remaining stale item:

1. Known limitation #5 (line 627) says "runtime/memory.js 待实现" but memory.js IS fully implemented with 26 passing tests and full add/search/remove/clear API. Remove this limitation.

This is the last blocker for architecture 85% → 90%. All other gaps (store/index.js, embed.js adapters, sense.js full API) are now documented in ARCHITECTURE.md.
